feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: WTax Non-Subject Amount in Invoice Sap Business One
entry.content:
hi

i have one question, how does the WTax Non-Subject Amount field in the AP invoice table gets updated? we have several invoices that have zero amount, before that field got always populated

thanks for the support

entry.title: Landed Cost Functionality
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking to see if anyone can give me guidance on the landed cost functionality. I have watched many YouTube videos and read many articles. The one thing I cannot tell is if this feature is customizable or not. From what I have seen then the standard use case will not work for what I am trying to do. 

I am trying to apply a standard freight costs to my incoming raw material through the GRPO with a journal entry of:

Debit - Raw Material
Credit - Standard Raw Material
Credit - Standard Freight 

Is landed cost the right function for this set up

Any advice would be helpful

entry.title: SAP shutdown
entry.content:
Many times following error shows and SAP is shutdown. Can anyone what is the issue, why it happens??

The program SAP Business One.exe version 10.0.180.0 stopped interacting with Windows and was closed. To see if more information about the problem is available, check the problem history in the Security and Maintenance control panel.
Process ID: 1861c
Start Time: 01dade451abca2c6
Termination Time: 28
Application Path: C:\Program Files\SAP\SAP Business One\SAP Business One.exe
Report Id: a337241b-4a38-11ef-b82c-0050568f8fb3
Faulting package full name:
Faulting package-relative application ID:

entry.title: Branches in SAP Business One
entry.content:
We are implementing SAP Business One 10 on our local server. These are the 5 different branches -

  1. TNM
  2. Security
  3. Digital
  4. OTS
  5. Digital

Single database and five different branches will be configured in SAP. The branches are in different locations such as Nashik ,Pune and Bengaluru. These are my doubts- 

  1.  If we generate five different companies i.e. five different databases, then is it optimized solution then single database ?
  2. Is cloud based SAP superior then local server because the locations are different ? 
  3. How will we use sap in Bengaluru if server is placed in Nashik ? What will be speed of communication ?
  4. How will we handle common inventory, business partners ? 
  5. If security company leaves the group and forms a independent company  then how to configure it ?
  6. What are the other challenges beyond this ? Some other problems which I can not imagine today ?

entry.title: SAP B1 UI error after upgrade
entry.content:
Hello,

We are having an issue where after upgrading to SAP  B1 v10 from SAP B1 v9.3, some users are having UI issues. Specifically on the Business Partner Master Data - Addresses window, the "text" field is completely missing. This is happening to only a few  specific users after the upgrade. The users have the same issue on  different devices. We tried disabling the addons we use (B1UP) but no luck.

Anyone has experienced this before, or has any suggestion please?

Thank you.

entry.title: API service layer in SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

 

Please advise, if we can use a customized query for the API service layer in SAP B1 with GET & POST Method.

 

Regards,

Shubham Bulley

entry.title: Intermittent Dashboard Functionality Issue
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community  Team

I am writing to report an issue we are experiencing with our dashboard. we have encountered intermittent functionality problems under the following conditions:

Our dashboard is experiencing intermittent functionality issues. Specifically, the dashboard fails to display information in numerical form (Tooltip) when hovering the cursor over it. This issue temporarily resolves after locking and unlocking the screen, but it reoccurs after some time. We need a thorough investigation and a permanent fix for this inconsistent behaviour. I have attached a screenshot  demonstrating this behaviour for your reference.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Best regards

entry.title: Nota de Entrada x Lotes de produtos - Incoming Invoice x Product Batches/Lots
entry.content:
Alguém já desenvolveu uma consulta que traga as notas fiscais de entrada onde apareça o item e o seu lote? Por exemplo, quero digitar o lote de um produto na cláusula WHERE e ele retornar as notas fiscais referentes.

Sei que o relatório de transação por lotes só aparece pelo documento de recebimento, e estou com dificuldades para criar o relatório.

English: 

Has anyone already developed a query that retrieves incoming invoices showing the item and its batch/lot number? For example, I want to enter a product's batch/lot number in the WHERE clause and have it return the relevant invoices.

I know that the batch/lot transaction report only appears by the receipt document, and I'm having trouble creating the report.

entry.title: Save draft to document in approval document
entry.content:
Dear All,

 I have issues to save draft to document in the approval document have batch and Bin allocate error (-10) Invalid "SerialAndBatchNumbersBaseLine"; specify a valid "SerialAndBatchNumbersBaseLine" when I using DI API.

My Code 

if(oDraft.GetByKey(Draft_Entry))

{

           oDraft.SaveDraftToDocument()

}

Thanks you

entry.title: We required Query Report from SAP b1 Inventory Opening Balance, Stock IN Out & Closing
entry.content:
Dear All,

We required Query Report from SAP b1 Inventory Opening Balance, Stock IN Out & Closing in below format

 

Sr.NoInventory GL-CodeItem Group Name Item codeItem DescriptionUOMPriceWarehouse CodeOpening BalanceOpening Total ValueIncoming(GRN,Goods Receipt Incoming Total ValueOutgoing, Goods Issue,ConsumptionClosing  BalanceClosing Total Value
1123456Raw Material2233556644XXXXNos7XXX1007001510515100700

entry.title: Customize GST report in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

This question is regarding the GST annexure reports available in SAP business one. I need guidance regarding adding of Document desires name and some other fields into the GST reports. how to get those fields added in the report. any guidance will be highly appreciated.

entry.title: fixed asset partial sell
entry.content:
hi,

in SAP B1 we a have a fixed asset that is the whole rack in the warehouse in one location, we need to sell part of the asset to another location.

is there any type of process where we can create another fixed asset based on a partial of the main asset?

for example we have a complete PC, but we want to sell the keyboard or a mouse 

thanks for the help

entry.title: Production Deviation | Desvio de Produção
entry.content:
[INGLÊS]

Ei pessoal!

Em uma Ordem de Produção, para um determinado item, uma quantidade maior foi consumida do que o esperado, enquanto outro item foi consumido em uma quantidade menor, então houve um desvio.

Perguntas sobre sites SAP

Para o item que consumiu um valor maior, tive um desvio de - 30,47, enquanto para o item que consumiu menos, o desvio foi de 168,10. Somando esses valores (-30,47 + 168,10 = 137,63), porém, a SAP diz que o desvio foi de -137,63, acredito que estamos errados, mas gostaria da opinião de vocês.
O desvio está em anexo.

[PORTUGUÊS]

Olá, pessoal!

Em uma Ordem de Produção, para um item determinado, foi consumido uma quantidade maior do que o previsto, já outro item foi consumido um valor menor, então teve desvio.

Para o item consumido um valor maior, tive um desvio de - 30,47, já o que consumiu menos, o desvio foi de 168,10. Somando estes valores (-30,47 + 168,10 = 137,63), porém no SAP tá dizendo que o desvio foi de -137,63, acredito que estamos errados, mas queria a opinião de vocês.

Segue anexo do desvio.

entry.title: Email Subject and Body
entry.content:
Hi All

Where can we predefine standard Email Subject and Body for sending Invoice and Statement to Customers?

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: E-Invoice and E-way bill , Can provide standard SAP B1?
entry.content:
Dear all,

Can Standard SAP B1 provide e-invoice OR e-way bill functionality into SAP for any platform like HANA / SQL ?  Or we need to develop third party tools for e-invoice OR e-way bill functionality?

SAP Business One  HANA / SQL

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Mandatory to buy SAP b1 Mobile license to access the mobile application of SAP b1
entry.content:
Dear all,

It is mandatory to buy SAP B1 Mobile license to access the mobile application of SAP B1 for any platform like HANA / SQL?

SAP Business One HANA / SQL

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Trial Balance Report Issue in SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,
 
Our customer is having issue in generating the Trail Balance Report for GL Account. The company transaction is started from the Date: 30-10-2023. However, when customer want to generate the trial balance report for financial year 01-04-2023 to 31-03-2024 they are expecting to get the OB (Opening Balance) column as blank or 0 for all the ledgers, however SAP is showing some values for all the ledgers. Need to resolve the issue.
 
Customer is using: SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.180) FP 2111 (64-bit) [SQL Version]
 
For more information, please find the attached screen grabs.

entry.title: PO User Defined Title Fields Form Settings Permission
entry.content:
Hi All

There is no permission settings to prevent User editing PO User Defined Title Fields Form Settings Display to show Visible? 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Failed to create form. Please check the form attributes
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I want to create a UI in SAP B1(SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.240) SP 2402  (64-bit)) but encountered an error saying, 'Failed to create form. Please check the form attributes.' I've initially checked the attributes as shown in the attached image and didn't find anything wrong. How do I fix this, any ideas? 

 


Best Regards.

entry.title: In MRP Wizard, Branch wise warehouse should be Disable #61312
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

In the MRP Wizard, step 4 Inventory Data Source, we need to disable the warehouses which are not linked to Branch. For example, if a user has authorized only one Branch then he can access only those warehouses which are linked to specific Branch.

Please share any workaround for the same.

Below is the attached screenshot for your reference.


Regards,
Shubham Bulley
